purpose: Persist external-consult evidence for the Papadopoulos phone-call tremor route decision.

route.name: Papadopoulos phone-call tremor
route.modality: smartphone embedded-IMU acceleration captured during phone calls
labels: UPDRS Part III item 20 right/left rest hand tremor
UPDRS Part III item 21 right/left action/postural hand tremor
route.eligibility_failure: No total MDS-UPDRS Part III target, no T1 items 9-14, and no WearGait-aligned gait/balance protocol.

kimi.summary: Do not launch another model experiment or access-gated scaffold until genuinely new data or credentials exist; record the negative web-search result and keep the paper/provenance story tight.

gemini.summary: Stop new modeling; formally reject the smartphone tremor dataset for this objective because it lacks total UPDRS-III labels.

decision: No preregistration, download, scaffold, or remote job. Keep as tremor-subitem / free-living context only.
